SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api.ai

Class AiAnalysisService

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.api.ai.AiAnalysisService
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAiAnalysisService
public class AiAnalysisService extends Object implements IAiAnalysisService
HTTP client for Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama AI provider APIs. Uses java.net.http.HttpClient (Java 21+) and Gson for JSON.

This class implements IAiAnalysisService and accepts InputStream-based scan report input and AiConfig for configuration.

Author:
Milton Smith

      public AiAnalysisService()

  • Method Details

    • analyze

      public String analyze(InputStream scanReport, AiConfig config) throws AiAnalysisException
      Description copied from interface: IAiAnalysisService
      Analyze a TLS scan report using an AI provider. The caller provides scan data as an InputStream, leaving the source open (file, URL, ByteArrayInputStream from a String, etc.).
      Specified by:
      analyze in interface IAiAnalysisService
      Parameters:
      scanReport - InputStream providing the plain text scan report
      config - AI configuration (provider, model, key, etc.)
      Returns:
      AI analysis text
      Throws:
      AiAnalysisException - on any error

    • chat

      public String chat(List<AiChatMessage> messages, AiConfig config) throws AiAnalysisException
      Description copied from interface: IAiAnalysisService
      Multi-turn chat about TLS scan results.
      Specified by:
      chat in interface IAiAnalysisService
      Parameters:
      messages - conversation history
      config - AI configuration
      Returns:
      AI response text
      Throws:
      AiAnalysisException - on any error

    • fetchModels

      public String[] fetchModels(AiProvider provider, String apiKey, String endpointUrl)
      Description copied from interface: IAiAnalysisService
      Fetch available models for the given provider.
      Specified by:
      fetchModels in interface IAiAnalysisService
      Parameters:
      provider - AI provider
      apiKey - API key (null for Ollama)
      endpointUrl - endpoint URL (Ollama only)
      Returns:
      array of model identifiers

    • fetchOllamaModels

      public static String[] fetchOllamaModels(String endpointUrl)
      Fetch available models from an Ollama instance via GET /api/tags. Falls back to OLLAMA_MODELS on failure.
      Parameters:
      endpointUrl - Ollama base URL (e.g. "http://localhost:11434")
      Returns:
      array of model names

    • fetchAnthropicModels

      public static String[] fetchAnthropicModels(String apiKey)
      Fetch available models from the Anthropic API via GET /v1/models. Falls back to ANTHROPIC_MODELS on failure.
      Parameters:
      apiKey - Anthropic API key
      Returns:
      array of model IDs

    • fetchOpenAIModels

      public static String[] fetchOpenAIModels(String apiKey)
      Fetch available chat models from the OpenAI API via GET /v1/models. Filters to chat-capable models (gpt-*, o1*, o3*, o4-mini*, chatgpt-*). Falls back to OPENAI_MODELS on failure.
      Parameters:
      apiKey - OpenAI API key
      Returns:
      array of model IDs
